query:
SELECT
                ar.id,
                ar.invoice_id,
                i.vendor_name,
                i.invoice_number,
                i.total_amount_cents,
                i.currency,
                i.due_date,
                i.processing_status,
                ar.created_at
            FROM approval_requests ar
            JOIN invoices i ON ar.invoice_id = i.id
            WHERE ar.tenant_id = $1
              AND ar.requested_from->>'user_id' = $2
              AND ar.status = 'pending'
            ORDER BY ar.modified_at DESC
            LIMIT 100
